title: sisymbrium entellicum
intro: Sisymbrium entellicum, also known as starry jasmine or sweet cicely, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Sisymbrium entellicum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
